_meta.purpose: Place / frame / diary data extracted VERBATIM from the Claude Design prototype (support.js / DCLogic in 'Eric Escapes.dc.html' lines 620-703), then RECONCILED against the real repo inventory (docs/SITE-INVENTORY.md, 17 galleries). The prototype numbers are DESIGN PLACEHOLDERS; the reconciled block is what the build should actually render.
_meta.rule: Where prototype and real inventory disagree, real inventory wins for DATA (routes, counts). Prototype wins for LAYOUT/type/motion.

index_bar_totals.note: '06 places · 263 frames' is the PROTOTYPE placeholder — 69+43+12+21+60+58 = 263. Recompute from the reconciled list, do NOT hardcode 263. RECONCILED FINAL (with HONG KONG slot 06): 69+43+21+58+59+18 = 268 frames across 6 places.

DIARIES.title: The Cure to GAS
DIARIES.excerpt: Gear Acquisition Syndrome, and how one battered 35mm finally cured mine.

DIARIES.title: Same chaos, different light
DIARIES.excerpt: Two cities, one intersection logic: what stays the same when everything moves.

DIARIES.title: Visual Diary: Kamakura
DIARIES.excerpt: A winter day on the Enoden line: thirty-one frames and one grey sea.

DIARIES.title: Night bus to Đà Lạt
DIARIES.excerpt: Twelve hours, three stops, one roll pushed two stops past sensible.

DIARIES.title: Negative space, taught by mountains
DIARIES.excerpt: What the Alps keep saying about leaving room in the frame.

prototype_verbatim.note_diaries: These 5 diary rows are prototype placeholders. The REAL Visual Diaries index is driven by src/lib/blog.ts getAllPosts() (70 posts). The prototype titles happen to match real posts: 'The Cure to GAS' (the-cure-to-gas), 'Same chaos, different light' (same-chaos-different-light), 'Visual Diary: Kamakura' (visual-diary-kamakura) all exist. Use real posts, not this array.

reconciled_final._note: This is the list the Archive home place grid and gallery routes should actually use. Coords/years/code carried from the prototype where the place matches; frame counts are REAL from SITE-INVENTORY. Slug is the real existing route (IA decision: keep existing URLs).

primary_tiles.name: SYDNEY
primary_tiles.source: prototype SYDNEY frames=69 EXACTLY matches /sydney2 (69). Confident map.

primary_tiles.name: JAPAN
primary_tiles.source: prototype JAPAN frames=43 EXACTLY matches /japan (43). Confident map.

primary_tiles.source: prototype VIETNAM frames=21 EXACTLY matches /vietnam (21). Confident map.

primary_tiles.name: AUSTRIA
primary_tiles.source: prototype AUSTRIA frames=58 EXACTLY matches /austria (58). Confident map.

primary_tiles.name: ITALY
primary_tiles.source: prototype ITALY frames=60 ~ /italy1 (59). Count corrected to real 59.

primary_tiles.name: HONG KONG
primary_tiles.source: Eric decision (locked 2026-07-06): 6th tile = HONG KONG. New gallery imported at public/images/gallery/hongkong/ (cover.jpg + 01-18.jpg, 18 frames). Tile cover uses gallery/hongkong/cover.jpg.

excluded.reason: 1 photo, placeholder/orphan gallery — never surface as a tile.

hong_kong_flag.RESOLVED: Eric decision locked 2026-07-06: 6th tile = HONG KONG → /hongkong. A new gallery was imported at public/images/gallery/hongkong/ (cover.jpg + 01-18.jpg = 18 frames, 2025, coords 22.28°N 114.16°E, code HKG). slot 06 in reconciled_final.primary_tiles is now HONG KONG. The concern below (no gallery) no longer applies; retained for history. The /hongkong route itself is built in a later phase (F1).
hong_kong_flag.issue: The prototype's 6th primary tile (grid slot 03 in prototype order, remapped to slot 06 here) is HONG KONG. The reference pack ships photo-hongkong.jpg and a full 6-frame HONG KONG gallery in the prototype. BUT the real repo has NO /hongkong gallery (not in the 17 galleries in SITE-INVENTORY). We cannot ship a Hong Kong tile that links nowhere.

options_for_eric.label: KOSCIUSZKO (/kosciuszko-25, 52 frames)
options_for_eric.rationale: Strongest real gallery not already a primary tile (52 frames). A distinct, striking alpine place; fills the 6th tile with real depth. RECOMMENDED — biggest archive, reads as a real 'place' chapter.

options_for_eric.label: SLOVENIA (/slovenia, 26 frames)
options_for_eric.rationale: Keeps the international / world-tour feel of the prototype's 6-country grid (Slovenia is a distinct European country, unlike Kosciuszko which doubles up on Australia). Fewer frames.

options_for_eric.label: CENY COAST (/cenycoast, 57 frames)
options_for_eric.rationale: Highest frame count of the unused galleries (57), but it is a NSW coastal region — reads as landscape/nature rather than the street/travel identity, and doubles up on Australia.

options_for_eric.label: Ship 5 primary tiles, drop the 6th
options_for_eric.rationale: Prototype grid is 3x2 = 6 tiles; a 5-tile grid breaks the 12-col span-4 rhythm (would need span-4 x5 leaving a gap, or a re-layout). NOT recommended without a design revisit — prototype is locked at 6.

hong_kong_flag.larry_recommendation: A — KOSCIUSZKO. Fills slot 06 with the deepest unused archive (52 frames), keeps the 6-tile 3x2 grid intact per the locked prototype. Needs coords/years/cover-image object-position supplied (not in prototype). Present as a tap decision to Eric before the builder wires slot 06.
